name: seat-chart-editor-v2

scripts.build:test: node scripts/patch-test-env.js && vite build && git checkout -- index.html src/components/auth/LoginDialog.vue src/components/layout/AppHeader.vue
scripts.build: vite build && pkg server.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --out-path dist/bin && "C:\Program Files (x86)\NSIS\makensis.exe" installer.nsi
scripts.build:nsis: vite build && pkg server.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --out-path dist/bin && makensis installer.nsi
scripts.build:exe: npm run build && pkg server.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --out-path dist/bin
scripts.deploy:test: git checkout test && git merge @{-1} --no-edit && git push origin test && git checkout @{-1}
scripts.deploy:main: git checkout main && git merge @{-1} --no-edit && git push origin main && git checkout @{-1}

description: This template should help get you started developing with Vue 3 in Vite.
author: Braydenccc
